---
title: "Resources"
description: "Useful resources for ASM-TMC members — journals, funding, career tools, and more"
---

This page collects key resources for students, postdocs, and faculty in the microbiological sciences. Use the search tool below to quickly find what you need.

---

## Find a Resource

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
allResources = [
  // Journals
  { name: "mBio", category: "Journal", audience: "All", description: "ASM's flagship open-access journal covering all areas of microbiology.", url: "https://journals.asm.org/journal/mbio" },
  { name: "Infection and Immunity", category: "Journal", audience: "All", description: "ASM journal covering host–pathogen interactions and mechanisms of infection.", url: "https://journals.asm.org/journal/iai" },
  { name: "Journal of Bacteriology", category: "Journal", audience: "All", description: "ASM journal focused on the molecular and cellular biology of bacteria.", url: "https://journals.asm.org/journal/jb" },
  { name: "Antimicrobial Agents and Chemotherapy", category: "Journal", audience: "All", description: "ASM journal covering antimicrobial resistance, drug development, and treatment.", url: "https://journals.asm.org/journal/aac" },
  { name: "Journal of Virology", category: "Journal", audience: "All", description: "ASM journal covering all aspects of virology.", url: "https://journals.asm.org/journal/jvi" },
  { name: "Microbiology Spectrum", category: "Journal", audience: "All", description: "ASM open-access journal with review articles across all microbiology disciplines.", url: "https://journals.asm.org/journal/spectrum" },
  // Funding
  { name: "NIH Reporter", category: "Funding", audience: "All", description: "Search active and past NIH-funded research projects.", url: "https://reporter.nih.gov/" },
  { name: "ASM Undergraduate Research Fellowship", category: "Funding", audience: "Students", description: "ASM fellowship supporting undergraduate research in microbiology.", url: "https://asm.org/Fellowships/ASM-Undergraduate-Research-Fellowship" },
  { name: "ASM Merck Postdoctoral Fellowship", category: "Funding", audience: "Postdocs", description: "Postdoctoral fellowship in medically relevant microbiology.", url: "https://asm.org/Fellowships/ASM-Merck-Postdoctoral-Fellowship" },
  { name: "NSF Graduate Research Fellowship (GRFP)", category: "Funding", audience: "Students", description: "NSF fellowship for early-career graduate students in STEM.", url: "https://www.nsfgrfp.org/" },
  { name: "NIH F31 / F32", category: "Funding", audience: "Students", description: "NIH predoctoral (F31) and postdoctoral (F32) individual fellowships.", url: "https://researchtraining.nih.gov/programs/fellowships" },
  // Databases & Tools
  { name: "PubMed", category: "Database", audience: "All", description: "NCBI database of biomedical literature with free full-text access to many articles.", url: "https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/" },
  { name: "NCBI Nucleotide / Protein", category: "Database", audience: "All", description: "Search nucleotide and protein sequences at NCBI.", url: "https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/" },
  { name: "BioProject / SRA", category: "Database", audience: "All", description: "Access raw sequencing data deposited in NCBI's Sequence Read Archive.", url: "https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/sra" },
  { name: "UniProt", category: "Database", audience: "All", description: "Comprehensive protein sequence and functional information resource.", url: "https://www.uniprot.org/" },
  { name: "PATRIC", category: "Database", audience: "All", description: "Bacterial Bioinformatics Resource Center — genomics, transcriptomics, and more.", url: "https://www.patricbrc.org/" },
  // Career
  { name: "ASM Career Center", category: "Career", audience: "All", description: "Job board and career resources for microbiologists.", url: "https://careers.asm.org/" },
  { name: "myIDP (Individual Development Plan)", category: "Career", audience: "Students", description: "Science careers IDP tool to help graduate students and postdocs plan their careers.", url: "https://myidp.sciencecareers.org/" },
  { name: "AAAS Science Careers", category: "Career", audience: "All", description: "Career resources and job listings for scientists from Science/AAAS.", url: "https://www.sciencecareers.org/" },
  { name: "Cheeky Scientist", category: "Career", audience: "Postdocs", description: "Industry transition resources and training for PhDs.", url: "https://cheekyscientist.com/" },
  // TMC / Local
  { name: "Texas Medical Center", category: "Local", audience: "All", description: "Official TMC website with information on institutions, events, and innovation.", url: "https://www.tmc.edu/" },
  { name: "BCM Graduate School", category: "Local", audience: "Students", description: "Baylor College of Medicine graduate programs in biomedical sciences.", url: "https://www.bcm.edu/education/graduate-school-of-biomedical-sciences" },
  { name: "UTHealth Graduate School", category: "Local", audience: "Students", description: "UTHealth Houston Graduate School of Biomedical Sciences programs.", url: "https://gsbs.uth.edu/" }
]
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof searchQuery = Inputs.text({
  label: "Search resources",
  placeholder: "e.g. journal, funding, career...",
  value: ""
})

viewof categoryFilter = Inputs.checkbox(
  ["Journal", "Funding", "Database", "Career", "Local"],
  {
    label: "Category",
    value: ["Journal", "Funding", "Database", "Career", "Local"]
  }
)

viewof audienceFilter = Inputs.radio(
  ["All audiences", "Students", "Postdocs"],
  { label: "Audience", value: "All audiences" }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
filteredResources = allResources.filter(r => {
  const q = searchQuery.toLowerCase();
  const matchesSearch = !q ||
    r.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
    r.description.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
    r.category.toLowerCase().includes(q);
  const matchesCategory = categoryFilter.includes(r.category);

  const aud = audienceFilter === "All audiences"
    ? true
    : (r.audience === "All" || r.audience === audienceFilter.replace(/s$/, ""));

  return matchesSearch && matchesCategory && aud;
})

html`<div style="margin-bottom: 0.5rem; color: var(--bs-secondary); font-size: 0.9rem;">
  Showing <strong>${filteredResources.length}</strong> of ${allResources.length} resources
</div>`
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
html`<div class="resource-list">
  ${filteredResources.map(r => `
    <div class="resource-card">
      <div class="resource-header">
        <a href="${r.url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="resource-name">${r.name}</a>
        <span class="resource-badge resource-badge-${r.category.toLowerCase()}">${r.category}</span>
        ${r.audience !== "All" ? `<span class="resource-badge resource-badge-audience">${r.audience}</span>` : ""}
      </div>
      <p class="resource-desc">${r.description}</p>
    </div>
  `).join("")}
</div>`
```

---

## ASM Membership Benefits

As a member of the national ASM, you gain access to:

| Benefit | Details |
|---|---|
| **Journal access** | Discounted or free access to all 14 ASM journals |
| **ASM Microbe** | Discounted registration for the annual meeting |
| **Career Center** | Full access to job postings and career resources |
| **Grants & Awards** | Eligibility for ASM travel grants, fellowships, and awards |
| **ASM Academy** | Online professional-development courses and webinars |
| **Advocacy** | ASM advocates for science funding and policy on your behalf |

Join or renew at [asm.org/membership](https://asm.org/membership).

---

## Suggested Reading

Selected high-impact reviews and resources for staying current in microbiology:

- [*Nature Reviews Microbiology*](https://www.nature.com/nrmicro/) — leading review journal covering all microbiology subfields
- [*Cell Host & Microbe*](https://www.cell.com/cell-host-microbe/home) — host–microbe interactions, microbiome, infectious disease
- [*PLOS Pathogens*](https://journals.plos.org/plospathogens/) — open-access research on pathogens
- [ASM Podcasts](https://asm.org/Podcasts) — *This Week in Microbiology*, *This Week in Virology*, and more

::: {.callout-tip}
## Suggest a Resource
Know a great resource that's missing from this list? Email us at [asm.tmc.chapter@gmail.com](mailto:asm.tmc.chapter@gmail.com) and we'll add it.
:::
